---
title: "Talis Self_efficacy"
output: word_document
date: "2026-03-18"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

# load library and dataset
```{r}
# libraries
library(tidyverse)
library(jtools)
library(gtsummary)
library(mice)
library(labelled)
library(interactions)
#data
df_all <- haven::read_dta("ttgintt4.dta")
```

```{r}
# replace missing values with R na to match the current missing values in Stata
df <-  tagged_na_to_regular_na(df_all) 

# make variable names lowercase
colnames(df) <- tolower(colnames(df))

# subset data for mathematics and drop unused levels
df <- df %>% filter(tt4g48a == 2)  %>% droplevels() 

```

# Subset Data
```{r}
df_summ <- df %>% as_factor() %>% filter(tt4g48a== "Mathematics") %>% dplyr::select(idschool, idteach, t4seins, t4self, t4secls, cntry, tt4g49, tt4g07a, tt4g07b, tt4g04, t4tagegr, tt4g21a, tt4g21b, tt4g24a, tt4g24b, starts_with("t4tyexp"), starts_with("trwgt")) %>%  mutate(instruct_eff = as.numeric(t4seins))
                                                                                    
# drop missing outcomes
df_summ <- df_summ %>% filter(!is.na(t4seins)) # only 50 missing

# combine not at all and to some extent
df_summ <- df_summ %>% mutate(content_prep = fct_collapse(tt4g07a, "Not at all / To some extent" = c("Not at all", "To some extent")),
                              pedagogy_prep = fct_collapse(tt4g07b,"Not at all / To some extent" = c("Not at all", "To some extent")))

df_summ <- df_summ %>% mutate(content_prep = fct_collapse(tt4g07a, "Not at all / To some extent" = c("Not at all", "To some extent")),
                              pedagogy_prep = fct_collapse(tt4g07b,"Not at all / To some extent" = c("Not at all", "To some extent"))) %>%
```

# Descriptive Statistics
```{r}
df_summ %>% dplyr::select(t4seins, tt4g49, content_prep, pedagogy_prep, t4tyexptt, t4tagegr, tt4g21a, tt4g21b, tt4g24a, tt4g24b) %>% tbl_summary(statistic = all_continuous() ~ "{mean} ({sd})") %>% as_flex_table()
```
# Preliminary Analysis
```{r}
library(lmerTest)
library(lme4)
library(jtools)
library(gtsummary)


df_factor <- df_summ %>% as_factor()

# Two Level Model - Country - best fit model by AIC and BIC

mlm1 <- lmer(
  t4seins ~ content_prep * pedagogy_prep +
    tt4g24a + tt4g24b + t4tyexptt + t4tagegr +
    tt4g04 + tt4g21a + tt4g21b +
    (1 | cntry),
  data = df_factor
)

tbl_regression(mlm1) %>%
  add_significance_stars() %>% 
  as_flex_table()

# Two Level Model - Country - best fit model by AIC and BIC
mlm2 <- lmer(formula = t4seins ~ as.numeric(tt4g07a)*as.numeric(tt4g07b) + t4tyexptt + t4tagegr + tt4g04 + tt4g21a + tt4g21b + (1|cntry),  data = df_factor) 
mlm2 %>% tbl_regression() %>% add_glance_source_note() %>% as_flex_table()
summary(mlm1)
end_time = Sys.time()
end_time - start_time

# Two Level Model - Country - best fit model by AIC and BIC
mlm3 <- lmer(formula = t4seins ~ as.numeric(tt4g07a)*as.numeric(tt4g07b) + t4tyexptt + t4tagegr + tt4g04 + tt4g21a + tt4g21b + (1|cntry),  data = df_factor) 
mlm3 %>% tbl_regression() %>% add_glance_source_note()
summary(mlm1)
end_time = Sys.time()
end_time - start_time

## Two Level Model - School
#mlm2 <- lmer(formula = t4seins ~ as.numeric(tt4g07a)*as.numeric(tt4g07b) + t4tyexptt + t4tagegr + tt4g04 + (1|idschool),  data = df_factor) 
#mlm2 %>% tbl_regression() %>% add_glance_source_note() %>% as_flex_table()
#summ(mlm2)

## Three Level Model - is singular so fit issues
#mlm3 <- lmer(formula = t4seins ~ as.numeric(tt4g07a)*as.numeric(tt4g07b) + t4tyexptt + t4tagegr + tt4g04 + (1|idschool/cntry), data = df_factor) 
#mlm3 %>% tbl_regression() %>% add_glance_source_note() %>% as_flex_table()
#summ(mlm3)
```


# Multiple Imputation

```{r}
#subset data
##df_subset <- df %>% select(idschool, idteach, cntry, starts_with("t4se"), tt4g49, tt4g07a, tt4g07b, tt4g04, t4tagegr, starts_with("t4tyexp"), starts_with("tt4g47"))
#start_time <- Sys.time()
#df_imputed <- mice(df_summ, m = 5)
#end_time <- Sys.time()
#end_time - start_time
#save(df_imputed, file = "df_imputed.rdata")
load("df_imputed.rdata")
```
# Single Level Linear Regression
```{r}
library(survey)
df_svy <- svydesign(data = df_summ, id =~cntry + idschool, probs = NULL, fpc = NULL, variables = NULL, repweights = "trwgt[1-100]+", type = "BRR")
m_svy <- svyglm(design = df_svy, t4seins ~ content_prep*pedagogy_prep + t4tagegr + tt4g04 + tt4g21a*tt4g21b, family = gaussian())
m_svy %>% tbl_regression() %>% add_significance_stars(hide_p = FALSE, hide_ci = FALSE) %>% as_flex_table()
```

# Instructional Self-Efficacy WITH WEIGHTS
```{r}
df_svy_imp <- svydesign(data = complete(df_imputed), id =~cntry + idschool, probs = NULL, fpc = NULL, variables = NULL, repweights = "trwgt[1-100]+", type = "BRR")
imp_svy <- svyglm(design = df_svy, t4seins ~ content_prep*pedagogy_prep + t4tagegr + tt4g04 + tt4g21a*tt4g21b, family = gaussian())
imp_svy %>% tbl_regression() %>% add_significance_stars(hide_p = FALSE, hide_ci = FALSE) %>% as_flex_table()
```
